190→def nodes_from_graph(graph: DependencyGraph) -> list[RoadmapNode]: 191→ """Convert graph nodes to flat RoadmapNode list (inverse of graph_from_phases). 192→ 193→ Preserves dependency information so it can be serialized to YAML frontmatter 194→ via render_roadmap_block_inner(). 195→ """ 196→ return [ 197→ RoadmapNode( 198→ id=node.id, 199→ description=node.description, 200→ status=node.status, 201→ pr=node.pr, 202→ depends_on=node.depends_on, 203→ slug=node.slug, 204→ )

## RoadmapNode Constructor Call Sites
Here are all the places where `RoadmapNode(` is called as a constructor (excluding the class definition and pre-existing tests in packages/erk-shared/tests/):
### Production Code (src/)
**1. /home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/roadmap.py:158** ```python RoadmapNode( id=step_id, description=description, status=cast(RoadmapNodeStatus, status), pr=raw_pr, depends_on=depends_on, slug=raw_slug, ```
**2. /home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/roadmap.py:448** ```python new_node = RoadmapNode( id=new_node_id, description=description, status=status, pr=None, depends_on=depends_on, slug=resolved_slug, reason=reason, ```
**3. /home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/dependency_graph.py:197** ```python RoadmapNode( id=node.id, description=node.description, status=node.status, pr=node.pr, depends_on=node.depends_on, slug=node.slug, ```
**4. /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/objective_render_roadmap.py:175** ```python RoadmapNode( id=step_id, description=step_desc, status="pending", pr=None, depends_on=depends_on, slug=slug, ```
### Test Code (tests/) - NOT in packages/erk-shared/tests/
**5. /home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_list_cmd_helpers.py:187** ```python return RoadmapNode( id=id, description=f"Node {id}", status=status, pr=pr, depends_on=depends_on, slug=None, ) ```
**6. /home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/screens/test_objective_nodes_screen.py:50** ```python return RoadmapNode( id=id, description=description, status=status, pr=pr, depends_on=None, slug=None, ) ```
---
**Summary:** There are **6 constructor call sites** across the codebase (4 in production code, 2 in tests that are not in the pre-existing erk-shared package tests). All pre-existing tests in `packages/erk-shared/tests/` have been excluded as requested.
